calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-09-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez appeared by zoom for and with Concepcion Cruz by zoom.

Mrs. Cruz stated that she went to Bank of America on May 13th, that the agent tried to call Merrill Lynch but had no luck, that they reached out to the agent and that they were told that they could not provide any information because it was too long ago. Mr. Benitez stated that he does not know if Merrill Lynch is holding on to the $60,000.00, and that presumably either Merrill Lynch has the funds, or they paid it out to the State. Mr. Benitez also stated that after the receipts are filed, the only thing remaining is discharge and that he is happy to assist. Mrs. Cruz stated that she has the signed receipts. The court noted that at some point the money will be escheated to the State. Status of the reserve is off calendar. The Motion to be Relieved as Counsel is continued to October 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Continued To Oct-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Continued To Jul-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Reserve
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Continued To Jul-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Gener Benitez appearing via zoom for Connie Cruz (petitioner).

Mr. Benitez and Mrs. Cruz indicated that the circumstances have not changed since the last hearing. The Court suggested that Mrs. Cruz go directly to a Merrill Lynch office and asked Mr. Benitez to prepare a letter for Mrs. Cruz to present to Merrill Lynch. Mr. Benitez agreed to do so. Status of the reserve and The Motion to be relieved as counsel are continued to July 31, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Continued To May-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Continued To May-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez appeared by zoom for and with Concepcion Cruz (executor) by zoom.

Mrs. Benitez stated that the $60,000.00 is being held by Merrill Lynch, that he has nothing to report because he is having issues communicating with the executor, that he has had appointments scheduled with the executor, but she did not show up, and that this is why he filed a motion to withdraw from the case. Mr. Benitez also stated that he has asked Mrs. Cruz to get a hold of Merrill Lynch, that he thinks it's a matter of getting a statement from them and filing a return, and that most of the money went to the Philippines. Mrs. Cruz stated that she tried to call Merrill Lynch, that they didn't give her anything, that Merrill Lynch called the niece in the Philippines who was told it was for the taxes, and that they haven't given her anything for the taxes. Discussion was held about getting a statement from Merrill Lynch indicating that taxes were withheld and Mrs. Cruz filing the tax return. Mrs. Cruz informed the court that she has a tax preparer. The court suggested that the parties get a hold of Merrill Lynch and informed Mr. Benitez that the prospect of getting out of this are slim. Status of the reserve is continued to May 22, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The hearing date of May 1st on the motion to be relieved as counsel is also continued to May 22, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Continued To Feb-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gene Benitez, via Zoom, for Ma. Concepcion Cruz, Executor.

The court acknowledges Mr. Benitez' declaration and asks for clarification regarding how much additional time he is requesting. Mr. Benitez confirms that the funds being held are a withholding and not a reserve and that his client has encountered the same issue in obtaining records from Merrill Lynch and it is not clear how long the process will take.

After additional discussion, the status is continued to Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Withheld Funds
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Continued To Oct-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gene Benitez, via Zoom, for and with Ma Concepcion Ramirez, Executor.

The court advises of its tentative ruling to either take the petition under submission with the intent to reduce fees and set a status hearing on the reserve or take the petition off calendar and set a status on close of estate. Counsel confirms that he submits to the court's tentative ruling to take the matter under submission. The court and counsel discuss the delay in clearing the Examiner's notes with counsel advising that there have been delays with obtaining records from Merrill Lynch.

The court takes the matter under submission and sets a status on close of estate for Sep-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

***Post hearing: upon further consideration by the court, the hearing on the Status on Close of the Estate set for Sep-12-2022 is changed to a hearing on the Status of the Reserve.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Continued To Jun-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gene Benitez and Chris Ibarra, in court, for Connie Cruz, via ZOOM, Personal Representative.

The court points counsel to the issue of a lack of response to the Examiner's notes. Mr. Benitez reports of possessing opening and closing documents but additional documents are required to begin preparing the accounting. The court and counsel discuss the $60,000 reserve with counsel advising that the reserve has been returned and that taxes owed may total $50,000 and is working on confirming the amount. Counsel requests a two-month continuance.

The Accounting Petition is continued to Jun-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file papers five court days prior to the next calling of this matter.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-24-2022 Continued To Mar-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Continued To Oct-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gene Benitez, Esq., counsel for and with Concepcion Cruz, Administrator (appearing separately by video conference).

Mr. Benitez reports on the status of the estate, advising that issues have arisen concerning revised IRS Form 1099s evidencing income tax withholding for the decedent and the necessity to file income tax returns for the decedent.

The Court advises counsel that counsel will need to file a Report of Status and Petition for Additional Time to Administer Estate reporting on the matters just presented to the Court.
The Court continues the matter to October 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. If counsel has filed the Report of Status and Petition for Additional Time to Administer Estate by October 20, 2020 with courtesy copies to the Probate Examiner, no appearance is necessary on October 27th.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported; Bailiff: Deputy Johnson. (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-17-2019 Continued To Oct-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez for and with Concepcion Cruz (Executor).

Mr. Benitez stated that it was a misunderstanding on his part, that he thought the report that he filed was sufficient and that he did not realize he had to do it in the form of a petition requesting more time. The Court advised Mr. Benitez to consult Probate Code 12200. Mr. Benitez also stated that he should be ready to file at least a partial inventory and appraisal close to the time when he files his petition. Status on close of estate is continued to October 15, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Benitez is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration by October 8, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Continued To Sep-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Gener Benitez for and with Ma. Concepcion A. Cruz.

The Court stated that it needed an Inventory & Appraisal (I&A) and Petition for Final Distribution. Mr. Benitez stated that the I&A would be filed in two weeks and that the estate consists of cash assets, a minimal bank account, and an investment account. The Court stated that if it includes securities that an I&A would be needed. Mr. Benitez stated that he would look at the statements, that the decedent died in 2016, that no one informed his client about the Alliance retirement account for one year, that now there's a claim, that this is holding up the distribution, and that he thinks it can be resolved in three months. At the conclusion of Mr. Benitez' comments, the Court continued the status on close of estate to September 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Benitez is to have a petition to approve status of administration on file by September 10, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.
